column1: ticket_text

My HackerRank submission is returning Wrong Answer on test case 4 but my code handles all edge cases I can think of. It passes the sample cases fine. Could the judge be using a different input format than what's shown?

I completed the HackerRank Python Developer certification track last week but the certificate still hasn't appeared on my profile. I can see the badge in my achievements but the shareable certificate link is missing.
HackerRank sent me a skills test invitation for a job application but the link expired before I could open it. The role closes tomorrow — can you resend the invitation or extend the deadline?

During a live HackerRank interview session my browser crashed and when I reconnected all my code was gone and the timer had continued running. I lost about 20 minutes of work. This is really affecting my assessment.

I've been suspended from HackerRank competitions after a plagiarism flag but I wrote every line myself. The code similarity is because we were both solving the same standard algorithm problem. I want to appeal this immediately.
My HackerRank account shows I'm logged in on devices I don't recognise. I changed my password but I'm worried someone still has access. How do I see all active sessions and log them all out?
I'm preparing for technical interviews. What types of problems should I focus on in HackerRank to improve my chances for software engineering roles at large tech companies?

I've been getting HTTP 429 Too Many Requests errors from the Claude API even though I'm well within the rate limits listed in my plan documentation. This started three days ago and is breaking my production app.
How do I pass a system prompt to Claude when using the Messages API? I want to set a persona for my chatbot application and I'm not sure if it goes in the messages array or somewhere else.
What is the maximum context window for Claude Sonnet and does it differ between the claude-sonnet-3-5 and claude-sonnet-4 versions? I'm deciding which to use for a long-document summarisation task.
My Claude Pro subscription was billed twice in the same billing cycle. I can see two charges of $20 each on my bank statement on the same date. I need a refund for the duplicate charge immediately.

My Anthropic API key was accidentally pushed to a public GitHub repository. I've already revoked it from the console but I'm worried it was scraped before I could act. What should I do next to secure my account?

Claude produced a response that contained detailed instructions for something dangerous when I was testing edge cases for my content moderation system. I want to report this so it can be reviewed and fixed.

I'm building a retrieval-augmented generation system and want to know how to structure my prompts so Claude focuses on the provided context and doesn't hallucinate facts outside the retrieved documents.

My Visa debit card keeps getting declined at contactless terminals even though I have sufficient funds and the card works fine for chip-and-PIN transactions. Is there a contactless payment limit I'm hitting?

There is a charge of $287 on my Visa credit card from a merchant called INTL PURCHASE that I absolutely did not make. I have never shopped with this merchant and my card has not left my possession. I need this investigated urgently.
I'm travelling to Japan next month and want to know if my Visa card will work there, what foreign transaction fees apply, and whether I need to notify my bank before I travel.

Someone has been using my Visa card number to make small test purchases online — I can see three charges of under $5 that I didn't authorise. My physical card is still with me so the number must have been stolen digitally.
My Visa card was reported lost two weeks ago and I received a replacement, but I'm seeing a charge on the old card number dated yesterday. How is this possible and what do I do?
How do I set up automatic payments for my Visa credit card bill so I never miss a due date? And can I choose to pay the minimum, a fixed amount, or the full balance each month?
